description: Introduction to theories of atomic and molecular structure. Description of materials properties with a focus on phases, intermolecular forces, band structure and conductivity. Introduction to organic materials, including polymers. Laboratory emphasizes chemical techniques typically needed in a scientific environment including observing, recording and discussing experimental data.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete all of the following
    • Chemistry 11
    • Complete 1 of the following
      • Complete all of:
        • MATH120 - Precalculus Mathematics (1.5)
      • Pre-Calculus 12
      • Principles of Mathematics 12
  • or permission of the department.
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of CHEM 101, CHEM 100, CHEM 124, CHEM 140, CHEM 150.
title: Fundamentals of Chemistry from Atoms to Materials
